name: YouTube Transcribe
tagline: Transcribe YouTube videos and generate summaries. Free subtitles first, Groq Whisper fallback.
description:
Transcribes YouTube videos and generates structured summaries. Uses free YouTube subtitles when available (no API key needed), falls back to Groq Whisper Turbo ($0.04/hr) for videos without subtitles.

Outputs: full transcript + structured summary with key points, quotes, and action items. Works for any language.

Triggers: 'transcribe video', 'summarize youtube', 'расшифруй ролик', 'сделай конспект'. Accepts YouTube URLs in any format.
